title: Each house of the legislature to judge whether contract complied with
doc_html:
§25.  Each house of the legislature to judge whether contract complied with

Each house of the legislature shall be the judge as to whether the work done for, or materials furnished to it, comply with the terms of its contracts or purchase orders.  

Acts 1983, No. 306, §2.

§25.  Each house of the legislature to judge whether contract complied with

Acts 1983, No. 306, §2.
